_comment: Curation overlay applied after Pediacities filter. Each entry rewrites the curated GeoJSON. Used to drop park-only features, deduplicate small island/marsh repeats, and any future renames/merges.

exclude.reason: 14 repeated marsh/water features, not a teachable neighborhood
mostly water in Pediacities boundary, not quiz-worthy
tiny outlying beach, not a recognizable neighborhood

merge_duplicates.reason: appears 3x in Pediacities; keep the largest polygon (the Brooklyn neighborhood proper, not the park slivers)
